nasb.text: They spoke to them at Shiloh in the land of Canaan, saying, “The Lord commanded through Moses to give us cities to live in, with their pasture lands for our cattle.”

esv.text: And they said to them at Shiloh in the land of Canaan, “The Lord commanded through Moses that we be given cities to dwell in, along with their pasturelands for our livestock.”

cnv.text: 在迦南地的示羅對他們說：“耶和華曾經藉著摩西吩咐要給我們城市居住，和城的郊野可以牧放我們的牲畜。”
